title: My Ease Is Permission for Others
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the pull to dim financial success around others, and allowing the full expression of a life thriving openly
excerpt: A short energy statement from the Day 82 theme of a 12-week money programme. The release names the old pattern of hiding or minimising wealth to keep others comfortable; the allow names the generous fact that ease with money gives others permission to find their own.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 82 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement from the Day 82 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 82: inspire others through your wealth. The statement names the old habit of hiding as the thing to release, and the generous model of living openly as the thing to allow.
I am ready to release every habit of hiding, dimming, or apologising for the abundance I have built. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the full, open expression of a life that thrives, knowing my ease gives others permission to find theirs. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 82 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
